seoTitle: Naughtons Gap vs Nebea — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Naughtons Gap and Nebea. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Naughtons Gap vs Nebea: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Naughtons Gap and Nebea.
heading: Naughtons Gap vs Nebea — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Naughtons Gap, New South Wales and Nebea, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Naughtons Gap has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Nebea (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Naughtons Gap or Nebea safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Naughtons Gap has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Nebea scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Naughtons Gap scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Nebea scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Naughtons Gap or Nebea?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Naughtons Gap has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
